species.notes: Dromedary support is pinned to domestic-dromedary archive evidence. Comparator material from other camelids does not promote dromedary support automatically.

scientific_scope: Dromedary support is restricted to Camelus dromedarius evidence. Other camelid or broader comparator material does not promote dromedary support.
runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.
